title: Sullust (star)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Star |image=[[File:BanePursuit-Jedi.jpg]] |name=Sullust |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]''{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] |sector=[[Brema sector/Legends|Brema sector]] |system=[[Sullust system/Legends|Sullust system]] |coordinates=M-17 |xyz= |routes=*[[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[Silvestri Trace]]/[[Sanctuary Pipeline/Legends|Sanctuary Pipeline]] |distance= |orbits=#[[Sullumun]] #*18 [[Moon/Legends|moons]] #[[Lununmo]] #*34 moons #[[Sululluub]] Asteroid Field #[[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] #*2 moons #[[Mumunubb]]/[[Munumubb]] |stations= |asteroids= |other= |class= |diameter= }} {{Quote|Damn that ''bounty hunter''! He's been on our tail ever since we left ''Sulon''. Why can't we ever keep these people in ''prison''?''"
"''Well, I ''did'' tell you not to exit the moon's atmosphere with the ''sun'' in your ''eyes''.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], on the light of Sullust|{{TCWComicCite|6.20|Outgunned}}}} '''Sullust''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Sullust system/Legends|Sullust system]]. {{Star-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{TCWComicCite|6.20|Outgunned}} ==Sources== *''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Sullust (Stern) |es=Sullust (estrella) |fr=Sullust (étoile) |pl=Sullust (gwiazda) }} [[Category:Stars in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Stars in the Trailing Sectors]] [[Category:Sullust system locations]]
